# BM Kicks

> Premium sneaker store in Qatar. Authentic Nike, Adidas, and Jordan kicks with AI-powered shoe recommendations, loyalty rewards, and flexible payment options.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Browse featured sneakers, categories, and all products with AI-assisted search.
- [Product](/product): Detailed product pages with sizes, stock info, images, and add-to-cart.
- [Checkout](/checkout): Secure checkout with support for standard and pre-order split payments.
- [Authenticity Guarantee](/authenticity-guarantee): Our commitment to 100% authentic products.
- [Brand Disclaimer](/brand-disclaimer): Independent reseller business model and warranty policy.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy-policy): How we collect, use, and protect your data.
- [Terms of Service](/terms-of-service): Rules and conditions for using our store.
- [Return Policy](/return-policy): Guidelines for returns, exchanges, and refunds.
- [Shipping Policy](/shipping-policy): Delivery times, fees, and coverage areas.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookie-policy): How we use cookies and tracking technologies.

## Optional

- [AI Shoe Consultant](/): AI-powered chat that recommends the perfect sneakers based on your style, budget, and preferences — accessible site-wide via the floating assistant.
